errors.name: Invalid request
errors.meaning: The request was malformed or missing a required field.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.meaning: No valid API key was provided.

errors.name: Forbidden
errors.meaning: The API key lacks permission for this resource.

errors.name: Not found
errors.meaning: The requested resource does not exist.

errors.name: Too many requests
errors.meaning: You have exceeded the rate limit; retry after the reset window.

errors.name: Server error
errors.meaning: Something went wrong on our end; retry the request.
